title: ZIMPLI - 12 Use Mega Value Baff Pack, 4 x Gelli Baff, 2 x Slime Baff & 6 x Crackle Baff, Children's Bath Toy, Birthday Present for Boys & Girls 4 5 6 7 8 9
features: PERFECT XMAS GIFT FOR KIDS: Christmas Presents for Kids. Individual boxes of all products available in our Zimpli Kids store
12 x BATH USES IN TOTAL: All skin safe, drain safe, easy clean & stain free and proudly made in the UK to strict European safety standards
6 x CRACKLE BAFF: Makes your bath water crackle, pop and change colour, just like popping candy
4 x GELLI BAFF: Magically turns your water into thick, colourful goo which can be drained away safely and easily by following the instructions
2 x SLIME BAFF: Magically turns your water into gooey, colourful slime which can be drained away safely and easily by following the instructions

product_details_tab_data.Title: ZIMPLI - 12 Use Mega Value Baff Pack, 4 x Gelli Baff, 2 x Slime Baff & 6 x Crackle Baff, Children's Bath Toy, Birthday Present for Boys & Girls 4 5 6 7 8 9
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Toys & Games › Baby & Toddler Toys › Bath Toys
product_details_tab_data.Color: Red, Purple, Green, White, Blue, Yellow
product_details_tab_data.Included Components: 2 x 150g Gelli Baff Red Sachets, 2 x 150g Bubblegum Smelli Gelli Baff Sachets, 4 x 150g Gelli Baff Dissolver Sachets, 2 x 150g Slime Baff Green Sachets, 6 x Crackle Baff Colours Sachets, Instruction Manual
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Not suitable for children under 3 years old due to small part choking hazard. Adult supervision required at all times. SLIME AND GELLI IS SLIPPY. Take care when entering and exiting the bath. Do not stand up until all Slime/Gelli residue is rinsed off the bath tub and your body. If product gets into eyes, wash with water for 10 minutes. If symptoms persist seek medical advice. Non-irritant formula. For sensitive skin, test a small amount on skin first. Ingredients are printed above. Non-edible product, DO NOT EAT. If product is swallowed, drink plenty of fresh water. Product is non-toxic. Do not pour Slime or Gelli powder into a bath without water. To avoid possible staining, do not allow skin to come in contact with powder prior to adding water or Slime/Gelli forming. Do not empty onto grass. Keep packaging for future reference.
